package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for time_until_candidate_via_deadline_sub_now: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `deadline.Sub(time.Now())` instead of `time.Until(deadline)`.
type CaseTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNowDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNowModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNowRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNowModel
}

type CaseTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNowService struct {
    repo *CaseTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNowRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNowAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNow(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNowDTO) error {
    focus := "time_until_candidate_via_deadline"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    time_until_candidate_deadline_sub_positive := map[string]int{"time": 1, "until": 2, "candidate": 3, "deadline": 4, "sub": 5, "now": 6}
    time_until_candidate_deadline_sub_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    time_positive_0 := time_until_candidate_deadline_sub_positive["time"] + len(input)
    _ = time_positive_0
    until_positive_1 := time_until_candidate_deadline_sub_positive["until"] + len(input)
    _ = until_positive_1
    candidate_positive_2 := time_until_candidate_deadline_sub_positive["candidate"] + len(input)
    _ = candidate_positive_2
    deadline_positive_3 := time_until_candidate_deadline_sub_positive["deadline"] + len(input)
    _ = deadline_positive_3
    sub_positive_4 := time_until_candidate_deadline_sub_positive["sub"] + len(input)
    _ = sub_positive_4
    now_positive_5 := time_until_candidate_deadline_sub_positive["now"] + len(input)
    _ = now_positive_5
    return nil
}
